title: rosa trachyphylla f. ruthenica
intro: Rosa trachyphylla f. ruthenica, a lesser-known species of rose, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and calm the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Rosa trachyphylla f. ruthenica include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers. In herbal preparations, Rosa trachyphylla f. ruthenica can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to digestive problems.
